statement.en: On Asymptotic Stability of Hybrid Systems with Frequent Updates and Sampled-Data Observers

proposer: Aneel Tanwani, Hyungbo Shim, Andrew Teel

reiTyping.dfumt8Reason: This is a preprint (dated 2026-04-25, future-dated or recent) in hybrid systems theory. The core mathematical claims (asymptotic stability theorems under sampled-data observation) are potentially CLASS-A formalizable and likely sound, but the paper has not yet undergone peer review or canonical publication. The results advance known theory (hybrid systems stability via Lyapunov methods) rather than overturning it. Classification as FLOWING reflects provisional acceptance pending publication validation.

ramanujanFormula.interpretation: 頻繁な更新が離散化の隙間を埋め、安定性が無限の積として現れる。

visualGlyph.interpretation: サンプリング点（ダッシュ圏）が連続軌道（外側）を安定化へ導く。
